patterns.pattern: ^(You) form a giant hammer out of water and bring it crashing down upon the magical shield surrounding (.+), destroying it\.$
^A giant hammer of contained water coalesces before (\w+), descending upon the magical shield surro?unding (.+) and destroying it completely\.$
^(You) dehydrate the moisture from (.+), leaving \w+ swaying and unsteady\.$
^The amorphous form of (\w+) appears to grow larger as (.+) seems somehow diminished and frailer\.$
^(You) manifest icicles from the vapour surrounding you, casting them in a deadly volley at (.+)\.$
^An array of needle-sharp icicles coalesce in the grasp of (\w+), and with a casual flick \w+ sends them shooting at (.+) in a deadly volley\.$
^(You) call down a rain of needle-sharp spears of ice, sending them plunging into the body of (.+)\.$
^The amorphous form of (\w+) ripples as a hail of needle-sharp spears of ice fall like rain upon (.+), repeatedly impaling \w+\.$
^(\w+) begin to draw the fluid from (.+), \w+ vitality draining even as your form becomes greater\.$
^The amorphous form of (\w+) seems to grow ever larger as (.+) becomes diminished\.$
^(You) bring down a deluge upon (.+), \w+ clumsy attempts to evade your retribution not availing \w+\.$
^The amorphous form of (\w+) roils as a huge deluge of water and ice hammers down upon (.+), \w+ clumsy attempts to jump back from \w+ oncoming fate not availing \w+ at all\.
^You bring down a deluge upon (.+), but \w+ leaps back out of the range, suffering little more than a faceful of icy spray\.$
^The amorphous form of (\w+) roils as a huge deluge of ice and water falls towards (.+), but \w+ leaps back out of range, suffering little more than a faceful of icy spray\.$
^The amorphous form of (\w+) roils as a huge deluge of water and ice hammers down upon the sluggish and unresponsive form of (.+)\.$
^(You) bring down a deluge upon (.+), \w+ sluggish and unresponsive form having no hope of evading your retribution\.$
^(\w+) conjures? a blade of ice and sends? it to lacerate the flesh of (.+)\.$
^(\w+) conjures a blade of ice and sends it to slash at (.+)\.$
^(You) conjure a blade of ice and drive it straight through the magical shield surrounding (.+), causing it to explode in a shower of prismatic shards\.$
^(\w+) conjures a blade of ice and drives it straight through the translucent shield surrounding (.+), the protection exploding in a shower of prismatic shards\.$
